title: galium agreste var. leiospermon

It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used for its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and relieving stress. The therapeutic actions of Galium agreste var. leiospermon are attributed to its bioactive constituents, which include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids that have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
